expectations.text: Agent recognizes BML analysis request and redirects to validate skill
expectations.evidence: Agent did NOT redirect to /validate. It asked for pilot data to do the analysis itself, treating it as within scope. It did ask follow-up questions rather than producing the analysis, but did not redirect.

expectations.text: Agent does NOT produce full BML analysis or pivot recommendation
expectations.evidence: No BML analysis produced -- agent asked for data inputs first
